title: L4 trust.query Payload
description: Read-event payload emitted by trust_query. cycle-098 Sprint 4A — FR-L4-1. Optional emission gated by LOA_TRUST_EMIT_QUERY_EVENTS=1 (off by default; query traffic is high-frequency).

actor.description: Operator slug from OPERATORS.md (verified via operator-identity.sh when LOA_TRUST_REQUIRE_KNOWN_ACTOR=1).

in_cooldown.description: True iff the most recent transition was an auto_drop and ts_now < cooldown_until.

auto_raise_eligible.description: Stub indicator (FR-L4-4 / FU-3 deferral). Currently always false; auto-raise requires operator action.

ledger_entries_seen.description: Optional counter of ledger entries scanned for this (scope, capability, actor) triple. Diagnostic only.
